html:
2026-0205
2026-03-06PMOCanada Elections ActBy-Election - Scarborough SouthwestOrder directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of Scarborough Southwest, in Ontario, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.N/A
subject: By-Election - Scarborough Southwest
precis: Order directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of Scarborough Southwest, in Ontario, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.
